form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 3.5 lengths at this track over 375m (21.38) beating Iris Haze in Class 3 on April 1. Was strong in the market and scored a soft win most recently. Stick with him.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th in a Class 4 on April 1 over 375m at this track behind Opawa Taz beaten 3 lengths (21.54). Missed the frame last time but prior to that had two placings in a row. Well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd on April 1 over 375m at this track behind Opawa Taz beaten 1.5 lengths (21.43) in a Class 4. Needs to find a bit more.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished 5th on March 26 over 375m at this track behind Boston Junior beaten 8 lengths (21.93) in a Class 3/4. Leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Has won three in a row. Good effort to score just five days ago over 318m at Manukau by 1.5 lengths in a Class 4. In sparkling form and can win again.
